design_philosophy.core_loop: Navigate platforming levels, avoid hazards, progress through level sequences
design_philosophy.primary_tension: Arcade-style obstacle avoidance and precision platforming
design_philosophy.player_fantasy: Guide a kiwi bird through New Zealand-themed platforming challenges
design_philosophy.what_makes_it_opinionated: Port of established arcade title (The NewZealand Story) with region-specific branding; designed as competent arcade-to-NES conversion prioritizing level structure fidelity over substantial innovation

difficulty.player_agency_in_difficulty: Hidden level select (Game Genie code) available for player experimentation

progression.unlock_mechanism: Sequential level progression through arcade-style stage structure
replayability_hooks: Hidden level select mechanic enables non-linear level access
Regional version differences (US vs EU naming/graphics) create variant experiences

world_building_techniques: Kiwi bird protagonist establishes regional setting

environmental_storytelling: New Zealand setting communicated through theming

sources_used: tcrf - The Cutting Room Floor: Kiwi Kraze article
